title: Mesothema auriculatum
intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant Mesothema auriculatum. However, I found information on the plant Mesosphaerum auriculatum, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. 

Mesosphaerum auriculatum is a type of flowering plant, specifically a shrub or a perennial herb, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. 

It is used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma.

The bioactive constituents of Mesosphaerum auriculatum include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Mesosphaerum auriculatum include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
